action: Fetch current news using Google search queries per genre and generate a brief narration script.

recipe.steps: Fetch the previously assigned genre-to-avatar mapping from memory.
Formulate Google search queries for each genre and fetch the current news results.
Generate a brief narration script based on the fetched news headlines for each genre.
recipe.generalized_functions:
def generate_narration_script(headlines, genre):
    """
    Generate a brief narration script based on fetched news headlines for a specific genre.
    :param headlines: List of news headlines.
    :type headlines: list
    :param genre: The genre for which the script is generated.
    :type genre: str
    :return: Narration script.
    :rtype: str
    """
    script = f"Here are the latest updates in {genre}:
"
    for headline in headlines:
        script += f"- {headline}\n"
    return script

# Sample usage
politics_headlines = ["Democrats lose another top contender for US Senate seat in Michigan after Whitmer and Buttigieg bow out", "Ketanji Brown Jackson is not holding back against Trump or her fellow justices", "Supreme Court says Trump must facilitate return of man mistakenly deported to El Salvador"]
business_headlines = ["Cash App owner Block pays 40 million in settlement over serious compliance deficiencies", "Retail investors are running headfirst into this topsyturvy market"]
sports_headlines = ["Justin Rose holds lead after thrilling first round of the Masters", "Two fans die in Chile before a Copa Libertadores match between Colo Colo and Fortaleza"]
breaking_news_headlines = ["Supreme Court says Trump must facilitate return of man mistakenly deported to El Salvador", "A Louisiana immigration judge will rule on Mahmoud Khalils release today"]
weather_headlines = ["A storm system will pivot across the Carolinas Mid-Atlantic and Northeast US into Saturday", "Dry conditions and gusty winds will bring critical fire weather Friday over parts of the northern High Plains"]

# Generate narration scripts for each genre
politics_script = generate_narration_script(politics_headlines, "Politics")
business_script = generate_narration_script(business_headlines, "Business")
sports_script = generate_narration_script(sports_headlines, "Sports")
breaking_news_script = generate_narration_script(breaking_news_headlines, "Breaking News")
weather_script = generate_narration_script(weather_headlines, "Weather")
print(politics_script)
print(business_script)
print(sports_script)
print(breaking_news_script)
print(weather_script)

recipe.steps: Confirm the completion of this action to generate narration scripts for each genre.
